findings.summary: prepare-runtime-launch defaults AllowedTool to Read,Write without Edit, forcing full-file rewrites that burned the status slice budget and self-blocked the tests slice; corrected per-launch via -AllowedTool, recommend changing the default in a future runner-hardening task
the tests executor self-blocking with a written plan instead of risking a mid-write budget death is exemplary protocol behavior and the retry applied its plan verbatim
docs attempt 1 failed on the operator plan session limit, an environment constraint outside the protocol; deliverable was already complete and the retry confirmed without duplication

summary: Reviewed all three slice diffs (status.ps1 +2-1, test-specbridge-cli.ps1 +3-1, v5-serious-pilot-status.md +16) plus 24 evidence artifacts. Verified via git diff that the coordinator authored zero changes to slice product files; coordinator interventions were launch-plan regeneration (tool allowlist) and preflight parameterization only. All three first attempts failed for environmental reasons, all three retries succeeded within the one-retry rule.
